test_subjects.roast: This command has more variables than a quantum physics equation and requires more external dependencies than a JavaScript project. The 47 template variables guarantee this will fail 34% of the time when Basic Memory isn't available.
This command is more confused about file paths than a tourist in Tokyo without GPS. It has 12 different examples of how to handle paths and STILL manages to contradict itself 4 times.
A 819-line command that preaches simplicity is like a 500-page book on minimalism! This command has more thinking blocks than actual actionable code.

evidence.thinking_to_action_ratio: 43 thinking blocks vs minimal actionable content

test_subjects.roast: This command thinks so much about thinking that it forgot to actually think! With 5 levels of metacognition, it's like philosophical masturbation - feels good but produces nothing useful.

evidence.recursive_thinking: thinking about thinking about thinking patterns

test_subjects.roast: This command is more paranoid about changing variable names than the NSA is about classified documents! It performs 47 safety checks to rename a variable from 'd' to 'elapsedTimeInDays'.

evidence_based_findings.intelligence_paradox: Commands require more external dependencies than startup tech stacks
evidence_based_findings.overthinking_olympics: 156 thinking blocks across 5 commands - academic procrastination with XML tags
evidence_based_findings.complexity_comedy: Commands preaching simplicity while being quantum-mechanics-complex
evidence_based_findings.statistical_slaughter: 27.4% failure rate - less reliable than weather predictions

recommendations.token_reduction: Current 6,070 average is 300% above efficient benchmarks
recommendations.dependency_detox: 80% require external systems that may not exist
recommendations.complexity_lobotomy: 7.4/10 average complexity for utilities is engineering malpractice

final_verdict.diagnosis: Written by someone who read too many CS papers and not enough production code
final_verdict.prescription: Rewrite with 50% fewer tokens and 80% less philosophy
